reasoning: Initial observation shows V = 20.0 when I = 2.0 and R = 10.0. Increasing R will help determine if V is directly proportional to R.
Doubling R from 10.0 to 20.0 resulted in V doubling from 20.0 to 40.0, suggesting V is directly proportional to R. Now, I will check if V is also dependent on I.

From the observations, it is clear that V is directly proportional to both I and R. When I increased from 2.0 to 3.0 while R remained constant at 20.0, V increased from 40.0 to 60.0, indicating a direct proportionality with I as well.
